name: yeeflow-app-builder
description: Yeeflow App Builder Codex plugin for building, validating, testing, and improving Yeeflow applications using Yeeflow-specific skills, including documented Yeeflow REST API capability mapping, browser OAuth API authentication, generated-final YAPK API-issued ID provenance hard gates, navigation runtime metadata hard gates, runtime-binding lessons guardrails for dashboard summaries and filters, approval real-control validation, navigation reachability checks, requester-context getUserAttr validation, app group ID and service portal payload guards, product-team YAPK schema refresh, Datetime canonical schema guardrails, app-plan conformance and navigation guardrails, product-team YAP/YAPK schema validation, Collection card-style and Collection + Grid table-style golden references, schema overlays, release safety scanning, package API automation, read-only workspace discovery and selection, and tenant-neutral environment configuration guidance.

interface.longDescription: Yeeflow App Builder Codex plugin for planning Yeeflow applications from requirements, generating and validating new .yap packages, learning from exported Yeeflow packages, inspecting and validating .yapk existing-application version packages, applying proven YAP/YAPK import-generation rules, documented Yeeflow REST API capability mapping, Browser OAuth-backed Yeeflow REST API authentication, Collection card-style and Collection + Grid table-style golden references, product-team canonical YAP/YAPK schemas with a separate Codex YAPK overlay, effective YAPK schema validation, generated-final YAP contracts, generated-final YAPK API-issued content ID provenance gates, generated-final YAPK navigation runtime metadata gates, dashboard grid-table Collection pattern gates, UI/Summary/KPI runtime hard gates, approval form designer-shape validation, workflow assignment assignee guardrails for manager-based and job-position routing, release safety scanning, ReplaceIds final coverage rules, workflow task URL page-type gates, advanced Yeeflow controls, reference-app UI templates, data-list system schema rules, read-only workspace discovery and selection, package materialization validation, app-plan-to-implementation conformance, navigation conformance guardrails, runtime-binding lessons for dashboard Summary/filter bindings, approval real-control validation, requester-context getUserAttr token wrappers, app group ID and service portal payload guards, signing/API proof boundaries, policy-as-data modeling, and official plugin release management. v0.6.60 adds executable Business Clarification Gate, Generation Readiness Review, and Functional Specification to App Plan traceability gates. It adds validate-business-clarification-gate.mjs, validate-generation-readiness-review.mjs, validate-functional-spec-to-app-plan-traceability.mjs, and regression coverage in test-clarification-readiness-traceability-gates.mjs. These gates block progression beyond planning when business decision gates remain unanswered, App Plan resource areas are missing, empty, placeholder-only, or incomplete, or Functional Specification requirements are not mapped to App Plan resources or explicit deferred/not-applicable coverage. They must pass before full-page design images, page implementation blueprints, resource generation, decoded resource-vs-blueprint parity, package/sign/upgrade, or runtime proof. They prove planning readiness and traceability only, not package validity, business correctness, signing/API acceptance, or runtime behavior. v0.6.59 adds Stage 1 Functional Specification and Stage 2 Yeeflow App Plan flow gates. New application generation must first produce and review the standardized Functional Specification at docs/standards/functional-specification-standard-template.md, then produce and review the Yeeflow resource-order App Plan at docs/standards/app-plan-standard-template.md; docs/app-plan-standard-template.md remains a compatibility entrypoint. It adds validate-functional-specification.mjs, validate-app-plan-resource-order.mjs, and regression coverage in test-functional-specification-and-app-plan-gates.mjs. Form Report is planned as a standalone Yeeflow resource based on Approval Form, not Dashboard, and Placeholder planning is required for Data List fields, Approval Form Submission fields, Task Form fields, and Custom Data List Form fields. Functional Specification and App Plan gates must pass before full-page canonical design images, page implementation blueprints, resource generation, decoded resource-vs-blueprint parity, package/sign/upgrade, or runtime proof. v0.6.58 adds full-page design blueprint generation gates. Canonical page PNGs must be full-page implementation-ready artifacts, not first-viewport mockups; viewport-only designs with below-fold content, missing planned sections, missing table/form detail, missing page end, unresolved placeholder regions, SVG-only artifacts, and design-board substitutes are rejected. Every page requires an implementation blueprint before Yeeflow resource generation, mapping visible design elements to Yeeflow controls with hierarchy, type, id, semantic nv_label, parent/child relationships, exact property paths, sizing/spacing/border/background/shadow/typography rules, data/list/field bindings, Summary/KPI aggregation, Data Filter variables, Collection/table columns, row links, Dynamic user/person bindings, progress/status/badge bindings, actions, interactions, and runtime proof plan. Property paths must validate against the normalized control-property registry or evidence-backed extension registry. Decoded resources must match the blueprint before package/sign/upgrade and fail on missing section/control, wrong control type, missing property, missing binding, missing action, missing or invalid nv_label, and placeholder/static substitutions. Functional spec, app plan, full-page designs, blueprint validation, control/property validation, decoded resource-vs-blueprint parity, package/sign/upgrade, and runtime proof remain separate staged proof layers. Navigation active-style gates from 0.6.57, Supplier runtime/design and proof-layer gates from 0.6.56, dashboard/data-list root-padding gates from 0.6.55, and Summary/filter/collection/content fidelity gates remain baseline behavior; approval-form root padding remains deferred because evidence is mixed, and pixel-perfect or live-runtime proof is claimed only when matching runtime evidence exists. v0.6.56 adds Supplier runtime/design fidelity gates and validation-layer proof gates. Runtime proof must use the installed application ListSetID and runtime URL, not install-log IDs. Generation claims must map design sections, KPI counts, page background/chrome, real Data Filter bindings, filter/action row nv_label, Collection source/detail links, real analytics controls, progress/status treatment, Summary/KPI raw-variable prevention, one canonical PNG per page, and design manifest page count/order/name mapping. Proof reports must keep schemaValidation, appPlanConformance, designContractValidation, controlBindingValidation, exactMetadataShapeValidation, idStabilityValidation, signVerify, installOrUpgrade, runtimeBrowserProof, and pixelComparison separate: schema pass is not UI proof, API/sign/install acceptance is not runtime/browser proof, proof layers must not be collapsed, decoded ListSetID must be tied to runtime URL proof, design-control mapping must be explicit, and the control-binding graph must be complete. Root padding hard gates from 0.6.55 remain baseline behavior, approval-form root padding remains deferred because evidence is mixed, and pixel-perfect or live runtime proof is claimed only when the matching runtime screenshot/pixel comparison and browser evidence is actually run. v0.6.55 adds dashboard and data-list custom form root padding hard gates. Dashboard/app page roots and data-list custom form roots must use attrs.container.cw = "2" plus attrs.container.padding = [null, { top/right/bottom/left: "--sp--s0" }]; scalar zero, numeric object zero, numeric array zero, attrs.common.padding alone, attrs.style.padding alone, and missing or wrong attrs.container.cw are rejected; upgrade and patch flows normalize dashboard page roots and data-list custom form roots before signing or installing; inner containers, cards, grids, and forms may keep intentional spacing; approval form roots are intentionally deferred because evidence is mixed and needs a separate export/runtime proof task. v0.6.54 adds Summary/filter/collection/full-page fidelity gates. It keeps Summary controls as normal type: "summary" controls instead of invalid _ak_c clipboard wrappers; requires page Resource.exts[] Summary pivot metadata with AppID, ListID, ListSetID, and nonempty settings.values[]; requires COUNT Summary settings to use ListDataID; requires top-level and attrs-level save_var/saveVar; requires hidden Summary source hosts hidden on desktop, tablet, and mobile with display:none; requires visible KPI values to bind to Summary temp variables rather than raw variables; reinforces real Data Filter controls instead of static Text, Add/New Containers with action-type "5" and target list metadata, Collection grid-table column gap 0, resolved collection links, progress controls instead of raw formula text, Dynamic user controls bound to User/identity fields, and field type compatibility gates; and does not claim pixel-perfect visual diffing, automatic screenshot parsing, or live runtime proof before install/cache smoke and focused runtime testing are performed. v0.6.53 adds Runtime Sample Data and KPI/Table Presentation Fidelity Gates. It adds runtime sample-data proof gates for redacted /users/search AccountID provenance, scoped item PATCH proof for blank User/person values, Events/list item batch-create proof for runtime sample rows, and retry/backoff or delayed verification for batch-created rows; adds Collection grid-table fidelity checks for root overflow hidden, aligned header/body grids, padding parity, real progress bar controls for progress-like columns, numeric progress source fields, Dynamic user/person controls bound to User/identity fields, and semantic nv_label values; adds KPI presentation fidelity checks for formatNumber(...), compact K/M/B formatting, fixed decimal formatting, long raw decimal rejection, and unformatted large-number rejection; reinforces that runtime values remain live and mock values are visual targets only; and does not claim pixel-perfect visual diffing, automatic screenshot parsing, or live runtime proof before install/cache smoke and focused runtime testing are performed. v0.6.52 adds KPI/card/table/action content fidelity gates. It makes content fidelity executable through inspect-ui-control-property-fidelity.mjs, validating KPI/card rich structure with fixed icon tile, centered icon, inline body, text stack, Summary/value, trend text, and helper text; Summary/raw-variable prevention; live KPI mock-vs-runtime data-value boundaries; rich table badge/progress/avatar/header/row-density treatment; Action Container behavior fidelity; add-list action-type "5" with target list metadata; child Heading/Text action labels; and semantic nv_label requirements. It does not claim pixel-perfect visual diffing, automatic screenshot parsing, or live runtime proof before install/cache smoke and focused Marketing Event runtime testing are performed. v0.6.51 adds Non-Container Advanced Style Fidelity Gates. It extends the Yeeflow control-property knowledge base with evidence-backed Advanced-tab rules for non-Container controls while keeping Container width, height, and layout under attrs.style, including attrs.style.height, attrs.style.cushei, and attrs.style.cusheiu. It defines non-Container common Advanced-tab styling through attrs.common.positioning, attrs.common.sizing, attrs.common.margin, attrs.common.padding, attrs.common.border, and attrs.common.background; maps attrs.common.positioning.widthtype [null, "1"] to full width, [null, "2"] to inline width, and [null, "3"] to custom width; requires Data Filter dropdown runtime 180px width to use attrs.common.positioning.widthtype [null, "3"], width [null, 180], and widthu [null, "px"]; adds hard gates for non-Container width model mismatch, Data Filter runtime custom width, Container rules applied to non-Container controls, common margin/padding, common border/background/hover/shadow, and two-color gradient boundaries; keeps the normalized product catalog as the base source of truth with evidence-backed extension entries rather than replacing control-configurations.json; and does not claim pixel-perfect visual diffing or automatic screenshot parsing. v0.6.50 adds Data Filter row hierarchy and Navigator label fidelity gates. It requires full-width filter/action parent rows, inline left filter groups, inline right action groups, inline/default-height filter wrapper containers, and Data Filter-owned fixed/custom 180px width; rejects legacy Status/Event Type wrapper width behavior under the 180px extension pattern; adds semantic nv_label guidance for Yeeflow designer Navigator-visible control names; distinguishes id, label, name, and nv_label; validates decoded Resource attrs so normalized specs cannot hide package-level mismatches; keeps the normalized control registry as source of truth and the extension registry evidence-backed; and does not claim pixel-perfect visual diffing or automatic screenshot parsing. v0.6.48 adds the Yeeflow control property knowledge base through docs/reference/yeeflow-control-configurations.normalized.json, docs/reference/yeeflow-control-property-extensions.json, docs/standards/yeeflow-control-property-knowledge-base.md, inspect-yeeflow-control-configurations.mjs, and test-yeeflow-control-property-knowledge-base.mjs. It provides a normalized/redacted product catalog registry with 93 control types and 1,824 control-type property entries; an extensible property extension registry for future evidence-backed export/runtime studies; helper support to list controls, inspect one control, normalize catalog data, and validate generated control specs; catalog-backed integration with UI control-property fidelity gates; and detection or rejection of unknown property paths, wrong-control properties, camelCase aliases, extension-only paths, and needs-study paths according to strictness. It covers Container, Data Filters, action controls, Icon, Heading, Flex Grid, Data List, Collection, Summary, and chart/data analytics controls. The raw control-configurations.json catalog is not committed, and this release does not claim runtime visual proof, pixel-perfect comparison, or automatic screenshot parsing. Remaining future work is to populate extension-registry entries only after redacted export/runtime studies prove missing property paths. v0.6.47 adds UI control property fidelity gates through inspect-ui-control-property-fidelity.mjs and test-ui-control-property-fidelity.mjs. It validates metadata-only Container attrs, Data Filter controls, filter/action row structure including full-width parent rows, inline filter/action groups, inline/default-height filter wrappers, Data Filter-owned 180px widths, semantic nv_label Navigator names, decoded Resource attrs, KPI card structure, mock-vs-runtime KPI boundaries, and dynamic KPI proof boundaries; reinforces Container vs Grid rules for visual composition, real Data Filter controls instead of static Text for filter UI, filter variables consumed by target Summary/Collection/List controls, refreshed runtime screenshots before capture, and signing/upgrade success not being visual proof; does not claim pixel-perfect visual diffing or automatic screenshot parsing; and leaves latest-artifact manifest guard, runtime proof freshness validator, and richer content-fidelity report schema/scoring as future work. v0.6.46 adds runtime navigation proof gates through inspect-runtime-navigation-proof.mjs and test-runtime-navigation-proof-gates.mjs. It validates structured JSON contract/runtime-evidence files only; enforces exact approved primary navigation labels and order, hidden support-resource expectations, explicit browser refresh-before-screenshot metadata, screenshot evidence metadata/path/status, and nav-scoped or exact-line runtime navigation evidence; rejects broad body-text-only navigation scans as unreliable; fails extra visible primary navigation items and support resources visible in primary navigation; reinforces that signing/install/upgrade success is not visual proof; reports app chrome fidelity, primary navigation fidelity, content structure fidelity, and dynamic KPI proof boundaries separately; keeps content-fidelity validators as future work; and does not claim screenshot pixel parsing or Chrome operation. v0.6.45 adds application layout chrome fidelity gates for generated Yeeflow design images. Layout 1 canonical chrome requires a dark header and dark vertical navigation; rejects header hamburger icons and bottom Collapse controls; enforces multi-page consistency for applicationChromeStyleId, header/nav mode, nav background, selected state, app icon/name placement, and content safe area; treats dark/light nav drift as a hard failure; rejects unsupported SaaS shells, arbitrary sidebars, top bars, floating navs, and unsupported navigation chrome; covers the Marketing Event-inspired Event Portfolio versus Planning Workbench regression with HEADER_HAMBURGER_NOT_ALLOWED, NAV_BACKGROUND_MISMATCH, and APPLICATION_CHROME_DRIFT findings; keeps screenshot-derived rules human-reviewed or review-required; and does not claim automated screenshot parsing or pixel-perfect verification. v0.6.44 adds Yeeflow application layout design standards for generated UI design images. It treats PNG/JPEG screenshots as the primary visual source for layout geometry and YAPK exports as supporting structural references only; requires generated page images to use one consistent official Yeeflow layout across the app, covering application-layout-1-vertical-nav, application-layout-2-horizontal-nav, application-layout-3-header-nav, and application-layout-4-no-nav; adds docs/standards/yeeflow-application-layout-design-rules.md, inspect-application-layout-design-rules.mjs, and test-application-layout-design-rules.mjs; requires header/nav/content safe-area rules, page title/action placement, dropdown or expanded menu behavior, and forbidden chrome patterns; supports JSON and Markdown contracts with equivalent structured fields rather than requiring a literal visualLayoutMatrix field; rejects arbitrary SaaS shells, unsupported sidebars, unsupported top bars, floating navs, and unsupported navigation chrome; keeps screenshot-derived rules human-reviewed or review-required unless a real parser exists; and does not claim pixel-perfect verification or automated screenshot understanding. v0.6.43 adds Phase 3B UI workflow enforcement. It adds inspect-ui-closed-loop-workflow-enforcement.mjs to validate workflow/report metadata only; it does not parse or mutate real YAPK packages, call Yeeflow APIs, generate packages, sign, install, import, upgrade, or create runtime evidence. It connects Phase 1, Phase 2, and Phase 3A gates at workflow/report level; enforces required artifacts for high-quality UI, design-fidelity, runtime-quality, and dynamic-KPI claims including UI contract, UI contract validation result, scope manifest and scope validation result for upgrade work, runtime evidence and validation result, design/runtime structure comparison findings, before/after KPI mutation evidence when dynamic KPI proof is claimed, and final report artifact paths; reinforces that install/upgrade success is not visual proof, structure comparison is not dynamic KPI proof, and dynamic KPI proof requires before/after mutation evidence; documents standard generated-ui-contracts, ui-upgrade-scopes, and runtime-evidence artifact paths; and closes the planned UI-quality track so future work is normal incremental improvement unless a new runtime issue class is discovered. v0.6.42 adds Phase 3A UI closed-loop hard gates. It makes the closed-loop workflow mandatory for high-quality UI, design/mockup, dashboard redesign, runtime-proof, Marketing Event-style, and one-page-at-a-time work; requires UI contract generation and validation, a scope manifest, scope validation, local UI/package hard gates, write confirmation before signing/install/upgrade, redacted runtime evidence, design/runtime structure comparison, and iteration on exact failing controls; reinforces that package validation, signing, install, upgrade-check, and upgrade-apply success are not visual proof; reinforces that dynamic KPI proof requires before/after mutation evidence; and adds Marketing Event-inspired synthetic regressions for missing design contracts, missing runtime evidence, one-page scope drift, Summary layout-resource ReportIds/exts/tempVars, top-level Pages[].ReportIds optional-only boundaries, Summary save_var.name and COUNT ListDataID, grid-table detail-link/template/column failures, fake upgrade success evidence, missing table sections, plain scaffold/placeholder detection, warning versus --strict behavior, and dynamic KPI proof boundaries. Phase 3B adds workflow-level enforcement through inspect-ui-closed-loop-workflow-enforcement.mjs, final artifact/report path checks, and metadata gates tying together UI contract, scope, runtime evidence, design/runtime structure comparison, and dynamic KPI mutation proof boundaries. Future UI-quality work is normal incremental improvement unless a new runtime issue class appears.
interface.defaultPrompt:
Use Yeeflow App Builder v0.6.60 to plan, generate, validate, and harden Yeeflow application packages. Before any Yeeflow API operation, check the REST API capability map, use only documented capabilities, check OAuth/API auth status, and if OAuth is missing or expired return plugin-login-flow guidance with auth_required / login_flow_required while preserving the original operation. Use read-only workspace and job-position discovery plus explicit target workspace confirmation for package install/import/upgrade. Require explicit confirmation for write capabilities, stronger confirmation for package install/import/upgrade/delete, and confirmed system-admin permission before job-position create/update/assign/remove writes. Treat schemas, package validators, workflow validators, assignment task assignee proof, runtime binding checks, API acceptance, plan-conformance checks, YAPK signing, generated-final YAPK ID provenance, generated-final YAPK navigation runtime metadata, YAPK upgrade ID stability, dashboard/data-list root padding hard gates for attrs.container.cw = "2" and token-array --sp--s0 root padding, dashboard grid-table Collection validation, UI/Summary/KPI runtime evidence, aggregate UI hard-gate smoke, control property knowledge base checks with inspect-yeeflow-control-configurations.mjs for legal product-catalog or extension-registry property paths, no invented property paths, wrong-control/camelCase/needs-study detection, control-property and content fidelity with inspect-ui-control-property-fidelity.mjs for Summary full-page fidelity gates for normal type: "summary" controls, no _ak_c wrapper children, Resource.exts[] Summary pivot metadata with AppID/ListID/ListSetID and settings.values[], COUNT ListDataID settings, top-level and attrs-level save_var/saveVar, hidden Summary source hosts with display:none, visible KPI Summary temp-variable binding, Container attrs, Data Filter controls, filter/action row structure, KPI/card rich structure, fixed icon tiles, centered icons, inline bodies, text stacks, Summary/value hierarchy, trend/helper text, Summary/raw-variable prevention, live KPI data-value boundaries, rich table badge/progress/avatar/header/row-density treatment, Action Container behavior metadata, add-list action-type "5" target-list metadata, child Heading/Text action labels, semantic nv_label requirements, runtime sample-data proof gates for redacted AccountID provenance, scoped item PATCH proof, batch-create proof, retry/backoff verification, Collection grid-table overflow/alignment/padding/progress/Dynamic user fidelity, KPI formatNumber compact K/M/B fixed-decimal presentation, long raw decimal rejection, unformatted large-number rejection, mock-vs-runtime KPI boundaries, dynamic KPI proof boundaries, Container vs Grid visual-composition rules, real Data Filter controls instead of static Text, Add/New action Containers with action-type "5" and target list metadata, Collection grid-table column gap 0, resolved collection links, progress controls instead of raw formula text, Dynamic user controls bound to User/identity fields, field type compatibility gates, extension-backed Radio Filter and Relative Period dropdown visual patterns, wrapper/input/dropdown-panel layer checks, native 16px filter icon controls, non-Container Advanced-tab style fidelity for attrs.common.positioning/sizing/margin/padding/border/background, Data Filter runtime 180px custom width through attrs.common.positioning widthtype [null, "3"], and two-color gradient boundaries, filter variable binding and target Summary/Collection/List consumption, refreshed runtime screenshots, and signing/upgrade visual-proof boundaries, runtime navigation proof with inspect-runtime-navigation-proof.mjs for exact approved primary navigation labels/order, hidden support-resource expectations, explicit refresh-before-screenshot metadata, nav-scoped or exact-line evidence, broad body-text nav scan rejection, support resources visible in primary nav failure, and signing/install/upgrade visual-proof boundaries, redacted runtime evidence templates, exact UUID Summary KPI proof, Data Analytics control identity guardrails, and approved app-plan hard gates as separate proof boundaries. Enforce Yeeflow application layout design standards and application chrome fidelity gates for generated design images, require one of the four official layouts with screenshot-primary visual rules, canonical Layout 1 dark header/dark vertical nav chrome, no header hamburger or bottom Collapse controls for Layout 1, multi-page chrome consistency, nav drift rejection, and no arbitrary app shells, then enforce standard app-plan structure, page-by-page UI implementation contracts, design/mockup-to-contract scaffolding with human review required when no reliable vision parser is available, Phase 2 design-to-runtime structural comparison without pixel-perfect visual diffing or full automatic image understanding, Phase 3A mandatory closed-loop workflow for high-quality UI/design/mockup/dashboard redesign/runtime-proof/Marketing Event-style/one-page-at-a-time work, Phase 3B workflow/report metadata enforcement with inspect-ui-closed-loop-workflow-enforcement.mjs before high-quality UI/design-fidelity claims, standard artifact path reporting, and final report evidence-chain checks, sandbox-page proof for uncertain UI/runtime patterns, export-proven Yeeflow control/style shapes, designer-shaped hidden Summary configuration with real fields, filters, temp variables, save_var expression objects, layout-resource Resource.ReportIds, matching Resource.exts, and Resource.tempVars, exact UUID Summary v1.0.1 dynamic KPI proof only when matching layout-resource ReportIds/exts/tempVars/headc variable bindings and before/after refreshed mutation evidence are present, explicit fallback labels when KPI values are not runtime-proven, UUID/runtime-safe IDs for Data Analytics controls, redacted runtime screenshot/evidence before UI-quality claims, structural design-to-runtime comparison against redacted runtime evidence before UI-quality claims, declared UI upgrade scope validation for ListSetID/app identity/page/resource/list/field/form/workflow/navigation/numeric ID drift, API-issued content ID provenance for generated-final .yapk, YAPK upgrade/new-version ID continuity for existing semantic resources, complete navigation runtime metadata, dashboard grid-table Collection wrapper/detail-link rules when planned, dashboard Summary layout-resource ReportIds/ext/tempVars bindings, filter variable consumption, approval real controls, navigation reachability, requester-context getUserAttr token wrappers, app group ID suitability, service portal gating, signing/API proof boundaries, and policy-as-data modeling before calling a generated app ready.

Current release note: v0.6.60 adds executable Business Clarification Gate, Generation Readiness Review, and Functional Specification to App Plan traceability gates. Use scripts/validate-business-clarification-gate.mjs, scripts/validate-generation-readiness-review.mjs, scripts/validate-functional-spec-to-app-plan-traceability.mjs, and scripts/test-clarification-readiness-traceability-gates.mjs. These gates block progression beyond planning when business decision gates remain unanswered, App Plan resource areas are missing, empty, placeholder-only, or incomplete, or Functional Specification requirements are not mapped to App Plan resources or explicit deferred/not-applicable coverage. They prove planning readiness and traceability only, not package validity, business correctness, signing/API acceptance, or runtime behavior, and they must pass before full-page design images, page implementation blueprints, resource generation, decoded resource-vs-blueprint parity, package/sign/upgrade, or runtime proof.
